---
title: "Memory"
subtitle: "Day 1 - Block 6"
format:
  revealjs:
    footer: "TI Workshop | D1 B6"
    bibliography: ../../../resources/workshop-citations.bib
    embed-resources: true
---

## Context = Short-Term Memory [^s1]

The session ("chat") is the agent's context (i.e. short-term memory).

We can also edit this history (e.g. in LangChain)!

> But: Context window is finite and session-bound! 

[^s1]: Sources: @langchainShortTermMemory

## Long-Term Memory

Memory system that 

- persists across sessions
- can be (much) larger than context window

-> *injects* relevant info into context

[^s3]: Sources: @willisonAgenticPatterns; @lewis2020rag

## Long-Term Memory (Level 1): MEMORY.md [^s4]

- Policy in AGENTS.md
- Facts/logs in MEMORY.md

```markdown
# AGENTS.md (memory policy)

## Memory policy
- Load `MEMORY.md` at session start.
- Append durable facts to `memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md`.
- If user says "remember this", write it down immediately.
- Promote stable preferences/decisions into `MEMORY.md`.

## Editing rules
- Keep entries short, factual, and timestamped.
- Remove stale items when contradicted by newer evidence.
```

[^s4]: Sources: @opencodeDocs; @openclawDocs

## {background-video="../../assets/videos/memory_policy_workflow.mp4" background-size="contain" background-video-loop="true"}

## Long-Term Memory (Level 2): "Clever" MEMORY.md [^s5]

We can post-process MEMORY.md:

- Summarize (compress)
- Prune it
- Introduce hierarchy (INDEX.md file pointing to other MEMORY.md files)

![](../../assets/images/openclaw.png)

[^s5]: Sources: @willisonAgenticPatterns; @microsoftMemorySchool

## Long-Term Memory (Level 3): [^s6]

Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) (*... and fancy systems on top of it*)

- Embed documents into vector space
- Compare query embedding to document embeddings (cosine similarity)
- Inject relevant passages into context

[^s6]: Sources: @lewis2020rag; @langchainRetrieval


##

![[Figure from LangChain](https://docs.langchain.com/oss/python/langchain/rag)](../../assets/images/rag_embed.png)

##

![[Figure from LangChain](https://docs.langchain.com/oss/python/langchain/rag)](../../assets/images/rag_retrieve.png)



## References {.scrollable}

::: {#refs}

:::
